## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.1

### 🔔 Notifications
- Updates the camera event blueprint so manual runs use the selected event entity's latest real recording data instead of requiring a live trigger.
- Keeps notification tap actions on the X-Sense Recordings panel link when available, while attaching cached `/media/local/...` video as Companion app media.
- Avoids sending a recording notification when no real recording URL is available.

### 📚 Documentation
- Adds the manual-run recording-link behavior to the root README, English README, and every translated README.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds blueprint regression coverage for manual-run event entity fallbacks and cached media/tap URL selection.
- Confirms event caching preserves the recordings panel link and exposes cached media separately.
